name: Modular Sectional Sofa - 3 Piece
description: A versatile modular sectional featuring deep seats and plush velvet upholstery. Perfect for modern living spaces with configurable layouts to suit any room configuration.

name: Eames Lounge Chair & Ottoman
description: Iconic mid-century design featuring molded plywood technology and premium leather upholstery. The ultimate relaxation piece combining timeless aesthetics with ergonomic comfort.

name: Solid Oak Dining Table - Extendable
description: Crafted from sustainably sourced solid oak, this dining table features a hidden leaf extension system. Seats 6-10 people comfortably with a natural oil finish that highlights the wood grain.

name: Scandinavian Fabric Armchair
description: Clean lines and organic curves define this comfortable armchair. Upholstered in durable bouclé fabric with solid wood legs. Perfect reading nook essential.

name: Arc Floor Lamp - Marble Base
description: Dramatic arc design with genuine Carrara marble base and brass-finished metal shade. Provides overhead lighting without ceiling installation. Dimmable LED compatible.

name: Platform Bed - Upholstered Headboard Queen
description: Modern platform bed featuring a tall upholstered headboard with vertical channel tufting. Low-profile frame creates a floating effect. No box spring required.

name: Round Marble Coffee Table
description: Elegant round coffee table featuring a genuine Carrara marble top with subtle gray veining. Gold-finished metal base adds luxury touch. Perfect centerpiece for modern living rooms.

name: Mid-Century Modern Dresser - 6 Drawer
description: Timeless mid-century design with tapered legs and clean lines. Six spacious drawers feature soft-close mechanisms and brass-finished handles. Crafted from solid walnut wood.

name: Executive Office Desk - Walnut & Metal
description: Spacious executive desk featuring a rich walnut wood top with striking black metal X-frame legs. Includes cable management system and ample workspace for productivity.

name: Executive Leather Office Chair
description: Premium ergonomic office chair upholstered in top-grain leather with diamond-stitched detailing. Features adjustable height, lumbar support, and recline mechanism for all-day comfort.

name: Floating Wall Bookshelf - Large
description: Modern wall-mounted bookshelf with asymmetrical compartment design. Creates visual interest while maximizing floor space. Perfect for displaying books, plants, and decorative objects.

name: Outdoor Patio Dining Set - 7 Piece
description: Complete outdoor dining set featuring weather-resistant aluminum frame with plush Sunbrella cushions. Seats 6 comfortably around a rectangular table. Perfect for entertaining on patios or decks.

name: Geometric Area Rug - Large
description: Contemporary area rug featuring bold geometric patterns in neutral tones. Machine-washable low-pile construction makes it perfect for high-traffic areas. Adds instant style to any room.

name: Round Side Table - Marble & Gold
description: Elegant accent side table with faux marble top and gold-finished metal frame. Compact size perfect for beside sofas or as a bedside table. Adds luxury touch to any space.

name: Slim Console Table - Entryway
description: Narrow console table perfect for entryways and hallways. Clean lines and slim profile maximize space efficiency. Crafted from solid wood with a smooth matte finish.

name: Mid-Century Nightstand - 2 Drawer
description: Compact nightstand with mid-century modern styling. Features two spacious drawers with brass pulls and tapered legs. Perfect bedside companion with open shelf for books or decor.

name: Mid-Century TV Stand - Media Console
description: Stylish media console with mid-century modern aesthetics. Features slatted door fronts, cable management, and adjustable shelving. Accommodates TVs up to 75 inches.

name: Industrial Bar Stool Set of 4
description: Set of four industrial-style bar stools with solid wood seats and black metal frames. Counter-height design perfect for kitchen islands or home bars. Stackable for easy storage.

name: Upholstered Dining Chairs - Set of 6
description: Set of six modern dining chairs with curved silhouettes and plush upholstery. Gold-finished metal legs add elegance. Comfortable for long dinner parties with supportive backrests.

name: Velvet Storage Ottoman Bench
description: Luxurious velvet ottoman bench with button-tufted detailing and gold-finished legs. Hidden storage compartment perfect for blankets, shoes, or extra linens. Elegant addition to bedroom or entryway.

name: Brass Pendant Light Cluster - 5 Light
description: Stunning cluster pendant light fixture with five globe-shaped glass shades suspended at varying heights. Warm brass finish complements both modern and traditional interiors. Dimmable LED compatible.

name: Round Wall Mirror - Gold Frame 36 inch
description: Large circular wall mirror with thin gold metal frame. Creates illusion of space while adding elegant touch to any room. Perfect above dressers, consoles, or as standalone statement piece.

name: Sliding Door Wardrobe - 3 Door
description: Spacious wardrobe closet with modern sliding barn doors. Features hanging rods, adjustable shelves, and bottom drawers. Space-saving design ideal for bedrooms with limited floor space.

name: Vanity Table Set with LED Mirror
description: Complete vanity set featuring large LED-backlit mirror with adjustable brightness. Multiple drawers and shelves provide ample storage for beauty essentials. Includes cushioned stool for comfort during makeup application.

name: Gold Tiered Plant Stand - 5 Shelf
description: Elegant multi-tiered plant stand with gold-finished metal frame. Five levels accommodate various plant sizes from small succulents to medium potted plants. Adds vertical greenery display to any corner.

name: Adjustable Desk Lamp - Brass with USB Port
description: Modern desk lamp with sleek brass finish and adjustable arm. Features built-in USB charging port for devices. Touch-sensitive dimmer switch offers three brightness levels for task lighting needs.

name: Crystal Chandelier - Large Tiered
description: Breathtaking tiered crystal chandelier with cascading prisms that create dazzling light refractions. Gold-finished frame adds warmth and luxury. Perfect statement piece for formal dining rooms or grand foyers.

name: Rectangular Coffee Table - Rustic Wood
description: Rustic-style coffee table with thick reclaimed wood top and industrial metal base. Lower shelf provides additional storage for magazines or blankets. Robust construction ensures durability for daily use.

name: Velvet Accent Chair - Channel Tufted
description: Luxurious accent chair upholstered in soft velvet fabric with channel tufting detail. Curved silhouette and slightly angled back provide exceptional comfort. Gold-finished legs add glamorous touch.

name: Farmhouse Dining Table - Rectangular
description: Classic farmhouse-style dining table crafted from solid pine wood with natural grain variations. Thick tabletop and sturdy trestle base ensure stability. Seats 6-8 people comfortably for family gatherings.

name: Linear Sofa - 3 Seat Linen
description: Clean-lined three-seat sofa upholstered in breathable linen fabric. Deep seats and plush cushions offer superior comfort. Tapered wooden legs add mid-century touch. Perfect for contemporary living spaces.

name: Bouclé Lounge Chair - Curved Silhouette
description: Trendy lounge chair wrapped in cozy bouclé fabric with curved barrel shape. Swivel base allows 360-degree rotation. Plush cushioning envelops you in comfort. Instagram-worthy statement piece.

name: Extendable Dining Table - Live Edge
description: Stunning live-edge dining table showcasing natural wood edges and organic shapes. Hidden extension leaf accommodates additional guests. Each piece is unique due to natural wood variations. Conversation starter for any dining room.

name: Storage Bench - Entryway with Hooks
description: Functional entryway bench combining seating, storage, and coat hooks. Lift-top compartment hides shoes and accessories. Coat hooks on back panel keep outerwear organized. Durable construction withstands daily use.

name: Folding Utility Table - Multipurpose
description: Versatile folding table suitable for crafting, dining, or as temporary desk. Lightweight yet sturdy construction folds flat for easy storage. Easy-clean surface resists stains and scratches.

name: Wall Mounted Floating Shelves - Set of 3
description: Set of three minimalist floating shelves in varying sizes. Easy wall-mount installation with hidden brackets. Display books, photos, plants, or collectibles. Clean design complements any decor style.

name: LED Floor Lamp - Arc Design with Remote
description: Modern arc floor lamp with integrated LED technology and remote control. Adjustable color temperature from warm to cool white. Dimming function sets perfect ambiance. Energy-efficient and long-lasting.

name: Nesting Coffee Tables - Set of 2 Round
description: Space-saving nesting tables with round marble-effect tops and gold frames. Smaller table tucks neatly under larger one when not in use. Perfect for small apartments or flexible living spaces.

name: Writing Desk - Minimalist White
description: Clean-lined writing desk with white lacquer finish and slim profile. Single drawer stores pens and supplies. Compact size fits perfectly in bedrooms or small home offices. Cable management grommet included.

name: Jute Area Rug - Natural Fiber Round
description: Handwoven round jute rug bringing organic texture to floors. Natural fiber construction is eco-friendly and durable. Subtle variations in weave add character. Works beautifully under coffee tables or in entryways.
